layout.title: Account settings
layout.description: Manage your own authenticated account separately from operational work areas. Use this area for profile context and password security.

profile.title: Profile summary
profile.description: Safe account information currently available from your authenticated session.

details.title: Available account details
details.description: This frontend currently uses authenticated session data for self-service account pages.
details.body: Full name and richer personal metadata are not currently available in the authenticated session payload. This account area deliberately shows only supported data instead of inventing profile information.

security.title: Security
security.body: Use the dedicated security page to update your password and review password guidance for this account.

empty.title: More profile controls can be added later
empty.description: This account area now separates self-service from admin user management. Future profile enhancements should use a supported current-user endpoint rather than admin user APIs.
